name: Into the Radius 2
short_description: Into the Radius 2 is an immersive VR survival shooter, set in a realm of surreal landscapes and deadly entities known as Pechorsk Anomaly. Arm yourself with realistic weapons and venture deeper into the mysteries that lie within, either solo or with a friend by your side.
detailed_description:
Dive into the eerie world solo, immersing yourself in a solitary and haunting experience, or team up with a friend in two-player co-op (hopefully four-player co-op in the future) and venture into the depths of uncertainty, bravely confronting the dangers of the Radius together.

Will you face the darkness alone or forge an unbreakable bond with your fellow Еxplorers?

In Into the Radius 2, every weapon features a detailed design and unique characteristics. The game offers a wide array of classic and modern firearms, all of which can be fully customized to match your preferred playstyle.

The modular weapon system allows you to swap and combine parts such as barrels, stocks, handguards, optics, and more. You can experiment with different components from various weapons and try out multiple setups until you find the one that suits you best. This level of customization makes it possible to fine-tune your loadout, whether you prefer lightweight mobility or long-range precision.

Weapon maintenance is an essential part of surviving in the Radius. Each component of your firearm needs to be cleaned and cared for individually to ensure reliable performance in the field. Keeping your weapons in top condition is crucial for facing the dangers ahead, so regular cleaning and attention to your equipment will help you stay prepared for any challenge.

In a surreal world ravaged by monstrous creatures and unforgiving terrain, survival is your ultimate goal. Scrounge for resources, defend yourself against dreadful enemies, and strategically manage your equipment to outlast the odds.

The Player Base, your haven amidst the chaos, provides a central hub for weapon maintenance, organizing your loadout, trading, and planning your next moves.

Use your hard-earned loot to acquire essential gear, but choose wisely, for every item has its value.

Take full control of your survival strategy with a deep customization system for Chest Rigs, Armor Vests, and Backpacks. Whether you rely on pre-configured setups or build your loadout from scratch, you can arrange pouches and holsters exactly where you need them, at the angle you prefer. Every detail is yours to command, allowing you to tailor your gear for both your playstyle and comfort.

Adapt, strategize, and make the most of your surroundings to stay alive.

Unleash your potential by collecting artifacts scattered throughout the Pechorsk Anomaly. Unlock new abilities and powers as you delve deeper into their mysteries, gaining an edge against the horrors that await. Keep an eye out for valuable treasures amidst the artifacts, as selling them will earn you the funds needed to acquire new weapons and upgrades.

Be careful when exploring the zone, as you can encounter dangerous anomalies at every turn. Some of these can harm your health, while others can create impassable obstacles, forcing you to look for a way around. Use your arsenal of useful tools to avoid the epicenter of a deadly entity and stay alive.
